subcodes.first_line: O thou who hast been guided to the straight path! The earth hath been illumined with the light of her Lord, and the horizons are aglow [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا من اهتدی الی الصراط المستقیم قد اشرقت الارض بنور ربها و اضائت الافاق
subcodes.subjects: @rejection, opposition and persecution, @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day, @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause
